vllm.title: [VLM] Remove `image_input_type` from VLM config
vllm.author: xwjiang2010
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Remove support for pixel_values and image_features.
User facing API is updated to be multi_modal_data = {"image": image}. See docs/source/models/vlm.rst.
Remove MultiModalData completely.
See #4194 for context.
cc @ywang96 @DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Doc] Reinstate doc dependencies
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #5852 caused some doc sections to become blank due to removing some doc dependencies. This PR fixes that.

vllm.title: [Speculative Decoding] MLPSpeculator Tensor Parallel support (1/2)
vllm.author: sirejdua
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for a draft worker with TP==1 and a target worker with TP>1. Support for draft worker TP>1 will come in a 2nd PR.
This PR makes use of #5414 to wrap the MLPSpeculatorWorker with a SmallerTPProposerWorker.
Adds a test case for

vllm.title: [ Misc ] Refactor MoE to isolate Fp8 From Mixtral
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MOTIVATION:

Prior to this PR, MoE layer + weight loading logic is repeated for all models
Prior to this PR, fp8 logic for MoE is coupled with Mixtral and unsupported for other MoE Models as a result
Prior to this PR, difficult to add other quantization methods without significant duplicated code in

vllm.title: [CORE] Quantized lm-head Framework
vllm.author: Qubitium
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MOTIVATION

lm-head and be quantized with minimal loss in accuracy
models like llama-3 have very large vocab sizes

SUMMARY:

support quantized lm head (for models without tied word embeddings)
update autogptq integration to enable quantized lm-head
added tests for ~all models that can fit in our L4

vllm.title: [Model] Jamba support
vllm.author: mzusman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add Jamba support to vLLM,
This PR comprises three parts:

The Jamba modeling file that encapsulates the Jamba model weights and logic itself and the mamba cache management.
Passage of the requests ids of the sequence groups and their sequence ids into the modeling file in order to be able to manage

vllm.title: [hardware][misc] introduce platform abstraction
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fixes #6059
the idea is to progressively absorb common if-else patterns into the vllm/platforms directory, so that we don't have scattered if-else clause for platform identification everywhere.
ideally, the platform identification is done in from vllm.platforms import current_platform , just once.
w

vllm.title: [Core] Dynamic image size support for VLMs
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR uses the input registry introduced by #5214 to implement an input process that inserts image tokens automatically at the LLMEngine level, so that it applies to LLM.generate.
Accordingly, I have updated LLaVA-NeXT and Phi-3-Vision to support dynamic image size. Along the way, I have expanded

vllm.title: [CI] Fix base url doesn't strip "/"
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Looks like in some environments, "/" is not stripped, and that causes failures because we cannot find the path "//tokenize"

vllm.title: [BugFix] Avoid unnecessary Ray import warnings
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently the logs are polluted with multiple Ray import warnings when it's not installed, even in cases where Ray is not being used. There should be an error only in the case that Ray is configured and/or required but not available, and in that case it should be fatal.
In our own builds/tests this

vllm.author: ywang96

This PR adds the proper formatting mapping to be applied to the user prompt to insert with image token (if necessary) when using OpenAI API server.
